'''âng-y-h''' ('''kangayah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pollinate|pollinate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-y-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pollinate|pollinate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-y-h
|-
! Lemma
| kangayah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingayah|thingayah]] || [[word:jingayah|jingayah]] || [[word:shingayah|shingayah]] || [[word:kingayah|kingayah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungayah|thuthungayah]] || [[word:jujungayah|jujungayah]] || [[word:shushungayah|shushungayah]] || [[word:kukungayah|kukungayah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungayah|thungayah]] || [[word:jungayah|jungayah]] || [[word:shungayah|shungayah]] || [[word:kungayah|kungayah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungayah|thungayah]] || [[word:jungayah|jungayah]] || [[word:shungayah|shungayah]] || [[word:kungayah|kungayah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengayah|thengayah]] || [[word:jengayah|jengayah]] || [[word:shengayah|shengayah]] || [[word:kengayah|kengayah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongayah|thothongayah]] || [[word:jojongayah|jojongayah]] || [[word:shoshongayah|shoshongayah]] || [[word:kokongayah|kokongayah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongayah|thongayah]] || [[word:jongayah|jongayah]] || [[word:shongayah|shongayah]] || [[word:kongayah|kongayah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongayah|thongayah]] || [[word:jongayah|jongayah]] || [[word:shongayah|shongayah]] || [[word:kongayah|kongayah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠngayah|thĂŠngayah]] || [[word:jĂŠngayah|jĂŠngayah]] || [[word:shĂŠngayah|shĂŠngayah]] || [[word:kĂŠngayah|kĂŠngayah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangayah|thathangayah]] || [[word:jajangayah|jajangayah]] || [[word:shashangayah|shashangayah]] || [[word:kakangayah|kakangayah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangayah|thangayah]] || [[word:jangayah|jangayah]] || [[word:shangayah|shangayah]] || [[word:kangayah|kangayah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangayah|thangayah]] || [[word:jangayah|jangayah]] || [[word:shangayah|shangayah]] || [[word:kangayah|kangayah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangayah|shangayah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangayah|goshangayah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangayah|gokishangayah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangayahnĂŒ|shangayahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangayahnknĂŒ|goshangayahnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangayahnĂŒ|gokishangayahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangayahshĂ«|shangayahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangayahnkshĂ«|goshangayahnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangayahshĂ«|gokishangayahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangayahro|shangayahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangayahnkro|goshangayahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangayahro|gokishangayahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangayahmu|shangayahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangayahnkmu|goshangayahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangayahmu|gokishangayahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangayahsher|shangayahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangayahnksher|goshangayahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangayahsher|gokishangayahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangayahng|shangayahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangayahnkng|goshangayahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangayahng|gokishangayahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangayahya|shangayahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangayahnkya|goshangayahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangayahya|gokishangayahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangayahyam|shangayahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangayahnkyam|goshangayahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangayahyam|gokishangayahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangayahnĂŒshĂ«|shangayahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangayahnknĂŒshĂ«|goshangayahnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangayahnĂŒshĂ«|gokishangayahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangayahnĂŒro|shangayahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangayahnknĂŒro|goshangayahnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangayahnĂŒro|gokishangayahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangayahnĂŒmu|shangayahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangayahnknĂŒmu|goshangayahnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangayahnĂŒmu|gokishangayahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangayahshĂ«nĂŒ|shangayahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangayahnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshangayahnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangayahshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishangayahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangayahshĂ«ro|shangayahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangayahnkshĂ«ro|goshangayahnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangayahshĂ«ro|gokishangayahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangayahshĂ«mu|shangayahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangayahnkshĂ«mu|goshangayahnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangayahshĂ«mu|gokishangayahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangayahronĂŒ|shangayahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangayahnkronĂŒ|goshangayahnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangayahronĂŒ|gokishangayahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangayahroshĂ«|shangayahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangayahnkroshĂ«|goshangayahnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangayahroshĂ«|gokishangayahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangayahromu|shangayahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangayahnkromu|goshangayahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangayahromu|gokishangayahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangayahmunĂŒ|shangayahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangayahnkmunĂŒ|goshangayahnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangayahmunĂŒ|gokishangayahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangayahmushĂ«|shangayahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangayahnkmushĂ«|goshangayahnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangayahmushĂ«|gokishangayahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangayahmuro|shangayahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangayahnkmuro|goshangayahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangayahmuro|gokishangayahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
